title.en: Deep Bone Extreme Zun said fiercely.

content.en:
Gu Chen's words were very reasonable, and the other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords also felt that they had to think of other methods, otherwise they would really be at risk of falling when the Ultimate Tribulation came.

"Or, let's just shoot and kill a batch?"

Deep Bone Extreme Zun said fiercely.

Swish!!!!!

The other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters all looked at this Deep Bone Extreme Venerable.

"Deep Bone Extreme Venerable, if you do this, other Eternal Rank Beings will do the same, maybe they will attack our juniors, you want to completely disrupt the entire Ultimate Land, and once you do this, those Ultimate Extreme Venerables will know that they may punish us heavily. "

Gu Chen Jizun said.

"Don't do that!"

Several other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters retorted one after another, and they all disapproved of this method.

"I'm just proposing, and everyone disagrees, so forget it!"

Deep Bone Extreme Venerable waved his hand and said.

Then they continued to discuss 09 and finally came to a decision.

"Perhaps, we can discuss with other Eternal Beings and open the most dangerous Ultimate Extreme Inheritance Land in the Ultimate Land - the Inheritance of the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, this Ultimate Supreme Inheritance is a very murderous existence, and his inheritance place is very dangerous, and it can definitely make a large number of Ancient and Heroic Ultimate Realm Lords fall. And our juniors, it's okay to let them not go. "

"I think it's doable, so let's do it!"

"Okay, that's it!"

Of course, the six of them could not truly Sasuke, because the inheritance of the Doomsday Extremity was not in their hands, and they needed to unite with other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters to convince those Eternal Tier beings who had mastered the Doomsday Extremity.

So, they just did it.

And they were not the only Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters who came up with this method, and after everyone communicated, they all felt that this method was very good, and they all agreed.

And the few Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters who were in charge of the Doomsday Ultimate Extreme Inheritance also reluctantly agreed.

After all, they, the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, didn't want to face the Ultimate Tribulation!

......

The City of Doom.

A group of Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords came here, and the ruler of the Doom Capital, the top Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord Tai Crocodile Extreme Venerable, received them.

"Everyone, don't worry, I promised you before, and I will naturally open the inheritance of the Doomsday Extremity, but if the Doomsday Extremity inheritance is opened, once it causes countless casualties afterwards, it will affect our Doomsday Capital. Therefore, it is necessary to explain the dangers of the Doomsday Supreme Inheritance first, which will reduce some trouble. "

Tai Crocodile Jizun said.

"No problem, even if they say it, they will still go in, after all, it is the inheritance land of the Ultimate Extreme Honor!" said an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord.

The other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters also nodded their heads, and they also felt that this was the case, the inheritance of an Ultimate Extreme Venerable, no Hao-level or Ancient-level could endure it, and they would definitely want to go over.

Dangerous?

What is this, many high-level and ancient-level people know very well that even if they are hiding, no one of them will live for a long time, and they will fall and die in disasters again and again.

After all, even an Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord didn't dare to guarantee that he could survive forever.

If you want to be truly at ease, you can only break through to the ultimate supreme.

Afterwards.

After many Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords had discussed, they spread the news, announcing that the inheritance land of the Doomsday Extreme Venerable was about to open.

Of course, if you want to enter the land of the Doomsday Supreme Inheritance, you have to pay some price, if it is free, it is estimated that many strong people will be suspicious, after all, where can there be such a good thing!

The price is that you need to pay a thousand ultimate crystals, which is not a big price for many strong people.

Suddenly, the news swept through the Ultimate Land like a tornado.

Linggu Capital.

Ye Tian also knew the news, and was immediately surprised.

"The inheritance land of the Doomsday Extreme, the Doomsday Capital is so generous this time, even such a inheritance place is open?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But if you think about it carefully, something is wrong, there are too many treasure lands that have been opened in the Ultimate Land recently, and now the inheritance land of the Doomsday Supreme Venerable has been opened.

He also learned that the inheritance land of the Doomsday Supreme Venerable has been opened very few times, and it is very dangerous inside, there is very little news about it, and most of the strong people who only know that it has entered have fallen.

But after all, this is the inheritance place of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and there must be a lot of chances, and the little opportunities that the Ultimate Extreme Venerable casually takes out are all great opportunities for them.

"Gotta go!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This is the only time he has the opportunity to enter the Ultimate Supreme Inheritance Land, if he gives up, I don't know how many long years it will take to hope to get such an opportunity!

Time flies.

One after another ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords rushed to the Doomsday Capital, and many more high-level lords also came.

Although the strength of the Hao level is weak, far less than the ancient level, it is said that the inheritance of the Doomsday Supreme Venerable is based on different cultivations, and the Hao level is also expected to get a greater opportunity.

......

"There are really a lot of strong people in the City of Doom today!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In addition to the many ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters, there are also many more Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters 560.

This time, the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord would not go in, but they would also come to see the excitement.

A few more days have passed, and the City of Doom has seen that the Hao-level and Gu-level have almost arrived, and it is finally about to open the inheritance place of the Doomsday Exaltation.

Soon.

In the place of the inheritance of the Doomsday Extreme, a large number of giant-level and ancient-level powerhouses gathered here, and there were some ancient-level existences around to watch.

"Let's turn it on!"

Tai Crocodile Jizun spoke.

Rumble!!!!!

A huge vortex emerged, and the voids of the Ultimate Land were twisted to form a passageway.

"Let's go inside!"

The crocodile is extremely respectful.

Whoa!!!!

One by one, the Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord was the first to enter, and the dense light penetrated through it, while the Hao Rank entered from behind.

After a while, all the strong men entered.

Seeing this scene, the Crocodile Extreme Venerable and the other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters showed a smile.

"Yes, so many strong people have entered, and more than seventy percent of them will die, and it will definitely delay the ultimate tribulation, and then arrange it again, maybe it can really end the ultimate tribulation directly like this." "

Gu Chen Jizun said.

"I hope so!"

These Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters said one after another.
